clEntries.5.11.23: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.23 includes improvements to forum response handling and CI/CD pipeline stability.
clEntries.5.11.22: Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.22 introduces enhanced forum responsiveness, improved workflow resilience, and updates to diagnostics and automation processes.
clEntries.5.11.21: v5.11.21: IR Blaster learning fix, energy divisors, soil moisture fix. (1) IR Blaster ZS06 manual cluster fallback for learning mode. (2) TS011F _TZ3210_xzhnra8x configurable ZCL energy divisors. (3) _TZ3000_dd8wwzcy added. (4) Soil sensor moisture fix in AdaptiveDataParser. (5) TuyaEF00Manager skip auto-convert for divisor:1 DPs.
clEntries.5.11.19: v5.11.19: Soil sensor compound frame guards, curtain motor physical button fix, CI/CD overhaul with auto-publish.
clEntries.5.11.14: v5.11.14: WiFi overhaul + bug fixes. (1) Fix settings blank spinner (Homey.ready). (2) New Easy Login: email+password only WiFi pairing. (3) Redesigned 4-tab configure.html for all 22 WiFi drivers. (4) Fix TS0002 _TZ3000_cauq1okq 2-gang=1. (5) Fix TS0203 _TZ3000_okohwwap → contact_sensor. (6) Fix radar DP4 distance/humidity confusion. (7) TuyaCloudAPI improvements.
